reason: AP penetration 106.6 mm exceeded effective armor 32 mm.
notes: Range-adjusted AP penetration: 106.6 mm at 80 m from a base 109 mm with 3 mm loss per 100 m.
Generated 7 AP fragments from the penetration point.
Spread heuristic: AP keeps a narrow cone for core fragments and a wider lateral spread for secondary fragments; authored randomness 0.04 widens both slightly.
Energy heuristic: Core fragments use higher energy from penetration margin 74.6 mm; side/spall fragments are scaled down.
Reach heuristic: Core AP fragments travel deeper (roughly 3.3-4.7 m) while side/spall fragments fall off earlier (roughly 1.3-2.6 m).
Continuation heuristic: Core AP fragments may continue through one major interaction at reduced energy/reach; side and spall fragments stop after the first impact.
